options.panelConfig:
---
anchors:
  thresholds-operstate: &thresholds-operstate
    - { color: "#FF3154", level: 0 }
    - { color: "#4BDD33", level: 1 }
  thresholds-traffic: &thresholds-traffic
    - { color: "#bec8d2", level: 0 }
    - { color: "#4BDD33", level: 1000 }
    - { color: "#FFFF00", level: 500000 }
    - { color: "#FF8000", level: 2000000 }
    - { color: "#FF3154", level: 8000000 }
  label-config: &label-config
    separator: replace
    units: bps
    decimalPoints: 0

cellIdPreamble: cell-
cells:
  "link_id:nokia-spine1:e1-1:nokia-leaf1:e1-33":
    dataRef: nokia-spine1:e1-1:out
    label: *label-config
    strokeColor:
      thresholds: *thresholds-traffic

    dataRef: nokia-leaf1:e1-33:out
    label: *label-config
    strokeColor:
      thresholds: *thresholds-traffic
  "nokia-spine1:e1-1:nokia-leaf1:e1-33":
